name: LiverRaAuditLocale
title: LiverRa AuditEvent — Locale
description: Records the UI locale actually rendered for the audited action (after fallback resolution). Used by `ReadoutClipboardExport` and other localized exports so forensic review can reproduce what the user saw at click-time (FR-029b, 002-acr-structured-readout).

element.short: UI locale active when this AuditEvent was generated
BCP-47 locale tag rendered (e.g. en, ru, ka, de)

binding.description: One of: en | ru | ka | de
